message:
fix(freeze): fix for-in codegen stack pointer bug causing infinite hangs

The C functions js_frozen_for_in_start and js_frozen_for_in_next expect
sp[-1] to contain the iterator/source object. The generated code was
passing &for_in_buf[0], which made sp[-1] access out-of-bounds memory.

Fix: Pass &for_in_buf[1] so that sp[-1] correctly accesses for_in_buf[0].

This fixes the infinite hang in tRPC procedure creation and any other
code using Babel's _objectWithoutPropertiesLoose helper which uses for-in
iteration.
